title: 盛って盛って、めっちゃ盛んぞー！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as we're wrapping up training, I notice Tosen
Jordan gazing out over the racetrack.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I just remembered I have something to do. You go
on ahead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may have said I can leave, but I can't help
worrying, so I decide to follow her.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... After all this running, my time isn't getting any better... Why?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey. Do you have a sec?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, Jordan! S-sure! Um... what can I do for you?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Um, you know the empty classroom next to the
infirmary? It's a nice, quiet spot. Meet me there,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh? W-wait!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Leeet's see... I'm pretty sure I have some in
Trainer's offi—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: WHOA! You scared me! You're still here?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, perfect! Can you lend me the key to
your office?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I need it, like, pronto. For real!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Tosen Jordan is planning to do
something with Daiwa Scarlet...
choice_data_list: Don't push yourself too hard, okay?
Don't push yourself too hard, okay?
How about I tell you a shortcut?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Tosen Jordan is planning to do
something with Daiwa Scarlet...
choice_data_list: Don't push yourself too hard, okay?
Don't push yourself too hard, okay?
How about I tell you a shortcut?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I'm still totes good to go. It's not cool to
underestimate people's stamina, you know.
choice_data_list: In that case, should we up your training load?
In that case, should we up your training load?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What? No, that's not what I'm—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Actually, you know what? Perfect! I'll do it! I'll
teach you a lesson for taking me lightly!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Starting tomorrow, I'll blow your eyes wide open!
You'll see!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: There's a shortcut?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her the easiest way to run straight to my
office from here.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
No cap?! That means... I can chill right up until
practice is about to start from now on!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Kidding! That was a joke! Geez, don't look so
serious!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Heh, you really are a pro when it comes to
running. Thanks for the help.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I leave the training ground and am walking
around campus when I hear excited voices coming
from a classroom.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ta-dah! ☆ Whaddya think?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's a lot of press-on nails... Okay... Well, I
have to get to back to training...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Chill out. You can spare a minute, right? Now,
what design do you want?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Marble? French? Oh, how about your favorite
character?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, Jordan, but I really have to get back to
running... So...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Come on, running all the time will just tire you
out. You gotta take a break now and then, you
know?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: But now isn't the time...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
It's fiiine. They'll dry right away. You realize
you're just wasting even more time arguing with
me, right?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Uh... In that case, please, pleeease do it as quickly as possible!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
No worries! I'm practically a pro when it comes to
nails! All right, tell me what kind of design you
want.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Erm... Well, how about a scarlet or something?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Scarlet? You want your own face on your nails?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: N-n-no! It's a flower!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm talking about those cute, bright red flowers
that bloom in summer...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
They remind me of my mom and grandma. One
time, after I won a race at my school sports day,
they bought me a bouquet of scarlets to match
my name.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
They told me that I won because I worked hard
every day. The flowers were a prize for all my
efforts.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: That's right... I...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: That story is fire! Let's go with that, then!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
And you should see the look on your face right
now. Sure enough, the things you love always
blow the bad vibes away!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That's right! You helped me realize something
important. I can't let myself get worn out!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
There you go! You've got it! We can build our
mental strength through our nails! Let's pile on
the motivation by piling more stuff on them!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: All right, one express set of nails, coming up!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hehe, okay! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Tosen Jordan freshens up their nails and,
in doing so, freshens up their spirits as well.
